race.comment: SHE'S EXCESSIVE (10) debuts and has won 5/6 jumpouts and placed second in the other. She finds a suitable assignment, and the in-form Meech is a positive jockey booking. She'll get every chance. LIGHT FILLED (7) resumes and she led narrowly beaten here when last seen. She missed a whisker over this trip at Ballarat on debut and won a recent Ballarat jump-out. Has plenty of gate speed, and a bold return is on the cards. SMOKE SCREEN (11) wasn't suited leading at Pakenham third-up. She had been beaten a whisker at Pakenham and Caulfield Heath prior over this trip, jumping favourite in both. She comes back 100m and will take a sit today. A player. REBEL STORM (3) debuts and placed in a recent jumpout. Has the inside gate and she's sure to be around the mark.
